name: @grihasetu/notes
description: Grihasetu docs/notes platform — a static MDX docs engine (Astro + MDX) split into a shared core, a feature demo and real note apps.

scripts.build: bun run build:demo && bun run build:demo:blog && bun run build:app && bun run build:app:blog
scripts.build:demo: bun astro build --root demo/notes && bun pagefind --site demo/notes/dist
scripts.build:demo:blog: bun astro build --root demo/blog && bun pagefind --site demo/blog/dist
scripts.build:app: bun astro build --root app/notes/go && bun pagefind --site app/notes/go/dist
scripts.build:app:blog: bun astro build --root app/blog && bun pagefind --site app/blog/dist
scripts.check: bun astro check --root demo/notes && bun astro check --root demo/blog && bun astro check --root app/notes/go && bun astro check --root app/blog
